title: BatchQueueSettings
description: Settings for the BatchQueue async task.

target_capacity.description:
Target capacity of the circular buffer measured in input batches. Must satisfy:
- target_capacity > 0

output_size.description:
Number of batches collected into each dequeued block. Must satisfy:
- output_size > 0

output_stride.description:
Distance in batches between two dequeued blocks. Must satisfy:
- output_stride > 0
- output_stride is a multiple of output_size
